pageContext.name: T-800 (Ultimate Edition)
pageContext.description: Come with me if you want to live.  Sideshow and Darkside Collectibles Studio is excited to present The Terminator T-800 Signature Premium 1/3 Scale Ultimate Edition Statue.   Following the 30th Anniversary Sarah Connor statue portrayed by Linda Hamilton and T-1000 portrayed by Robert Patrick the studio Is proud to present the final masterpiece of the Terminator 2 Judgement Day 30th Anniversary Character Series, the Terminator T-800.  Featuring the likeness of the actor Arnold Schwarzenegger, the ultimate edition captures the iconic scenes of the Galleria shoot-out, the Pescadero Hospital escape and the Cyberdyne Minigun police shoot-out. All major display options from the movie are included.   Galleria shoot-out features the Terminator stepping on the roses and holding the Winchester 1887 Shotgun.  Pescadero Hospital escape features the Terminator on a plain base holding the Winchester 1887 Shotgun.  Cyberdyne Shoot out Minigun Attack features the Terminator on a Plain or minigun bullet base, holding the Hand Held M134 Minigun, the minigun ammo bag strapped in one shoulder and the M79 grenade launcher on the other. The statue can be displayed with or without the fabric grenade launcher belt.   Cyberdyne Shoot out Grenade Launcher Attack features the Terminator on a Plain or minigun bullet base holding the M79 Grenade Launcher and can be displayed with or without the fabric grenade launcher belt.  Fully sculpted to the finest detail this masterpiece gives a super realistic look of the character. The detail of each part including the leather jacket is pure perfection. The weapons Winchester 1887, M79 grenade launcher, Hand Held M134 Minigun and Colt Series 70/Detonics 1911 Hybrid belt pistol are precisely reproduced with a high attention to every detail. In addition, the removable sunglasses complete the stunning presentation.    The statue is masterfully handcrafted and individually hand-painted to the highest quality standards.
